docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $417.73 FILED BY KAZEMINEJAD,AMIR AS TO DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS & KITCHENS- LOWENTHAL,LARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS & KITCHENS- LOWENTHAL,LARRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAZEMINEJAD,AMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILMAN SCREENS & KITCHENS- LOWENTHAL,LARRY $218.87 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $233.87, THERE WAS MUTUAL ERROR BY BOTH THE PLTF & DEFT IN THEIR ASSUMPTIONS. THUS COURT FINDS PLTF SHOULD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
